title: Cuneiform Tablet #0588: Neo-Babylonian Magical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a magical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a magical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Magical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records magical matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
